title: Gorchymyn y parti arall
applicationTitle: Gorchymyn bod y parti arall yn gwneud rhywbeth
genericGuidanceRep: [W]Upload letters, photos or documents if they are relevant to the claimant’s application. Do not upload any other material.
contactApplicationTextRep: [W]Give details of the claimant’s application in the text box or upload a file

content.text: Defnyddiwch y ffurflen hon i ofyn i’r tribiwnlys orchymyn bod y parti arall yn gwneud neu’n darparu rhywbeth.
Manylion i’w cynnwys yn eich cais:

items: beth ydych chi eisiau i’r parti arall ei wneud. Er enghraifft: Efallai y byddwch eisiau i’r parti arall ddarparu gwybodaeth, dogfennau, neu fanylion pellach am ei ymateb
pam fod hyn yn berthnasol i’ch hawliad
os ydych eisoes wedi gofyn i’r parti arall wneud neu ddarparu'r peth hwn. Os ydych wedi gwneud hynny, dywedwch wrthym pryd y gwnaethoch chi ofyn a beth oedd ei ymateb
os nad ydych wedi gofyn i’r parti arall wneud neu ddarparu’r peth hwn, esboniwch pam

contentRep.text: [W]Use this form to ask the tribunal to order the other party to do or provide something.

items: [W]what the claimant wants the other party to do. For example: the claimant may want the other party to provide information, documents, or further details of their response
[W]why it is relevant to the claimant’s claim
[W]if the claimant has already asked the other party to do or provide this thing. If they have, tell us when they asked and what the other party’s response was
[W]if the claimant has not asked the other party to do or provide this thing yet, explain why
